title: Company Names Tribunal decision: BSH Home Appliances (China) Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5475  Applicant BSH Home Appliances Limited objected to the name used by BSH Home Appliances (China) Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of BSH Home Appliances (China) Co., Ltd is changed to 15988697, Ltd. "
